response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the provided Reference JSON for the songs '未来島 -Future Island-' (Mekimeki) and 'Dancing Reed'. 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was utilized for song identification; however, manual transcription was performed for the full lyrics as the JSON was incomplete. 3. Timing & Pacing: Both songs feature rapid vocals and rap sections, necessitating aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions to prevent cascading delays. Visual title cards for each song were subtitled according to the Visual Events rule.

subtitles.original: 危険な海に浮かぶ島...
subtitles.english: An island floating in dangerous seas...

subtitles.original: 世界を変える未来島、LOVE IT！
subtitles.english: A future island that changes the world, love it!

subtitles.original: This mind is undefeated,
subtitles.english: This mind is undefeated,

subtitles.original: Until my goal's completed.
subtitles.english: Until my goal's completed.

subtitles.original: Let's keep on searching for the treasure of to come.
subtitles.english: Let's keep on searching for the treasure of to come.

subtitles.original: Genius! A miracle, a deity gotta set it free.
subtitles.english: Genius! A miracle, a deity gotta set it free.

subtitles.original: Science! Fantastic dreams are burning up inside of me.
subtitles.english: Science! Fantastic dreams are burning up inside of me.

subtitles.original: Experience! I'll turn the world around with new technology.
subtitles.english: Experience! I'll turn the world around with new technology.

subtitles.original: Future! A laboratory cast upon the sea.
subtitles.english: Future! A laboratory cast upon the sea.

subtitles.original: Poisoned to evil and the contents of mind
subtitles.english: Poisoned to evil and the contents of mind

subtitles.original: Right into knowledge greedy by a learned satellite
subtitles.english: Right into knowledge greedy by a learned satellite

subtitles.original: Ideas can't stop rushing out, stop thinking they might
subtitles.english: Ideas can't stop rushing out, stop thinking they might

subtitles.original: Could use a hand, at too busy working into the night
subtitles.english: Could use a hand, at too busy working into the night

subtitles.original: The pirate king who braves the ocean while in search of elation
subtitles.english: The pirate king who braves the ocean while in search of elation

subtitles.original: A ruler of invention that can modify your reason
subtitles.english: A ruler of invention that can modify your reason

subtitles.original: Once washed in jealousy, someday I've gotta be
subtitles.english: Once washed in jealousy, someday I've gotta be

subtitles.original: Fixed on the throne, I know what I've gotta do
subtitles.english: Fixed on the throne, I know what I've gotta do

subtitles.original: ベガパンク
subtitles.english: Vegapunk

subtitles.original: 革命をここから
subtitles.english: Revolution starts from here

subtitles.original: ベガパンク！
subtitles.english: Vegapunk!

subtitles.original: 言う事聞かなきゃ振りかざす 正義
subtitles.english: If you don't listen, I'll brandish justice

subtitles.original: 世界守る軍団の 正義
subtitles.english: The justice of the army protecting the world

subtitles.original: 秘密巡る怪しい企み
subtitles.english: Suspicious schemes surrounding secrets

subtitles.original: 過去の記憶に隠された狂気
subtitles.english: Madness hidden in memories of the past

subtitles.original: 真実を秘めた勇気
subtitles.english: Courage harboring the truth

subtitles.original: 謎に満ちたその夢のエネルギー
subtitles.english: That dream's energy, filled with mystery

subtitles.original: 天才が見せる世界の形
subtitles.english: The shape of the world the genius reveals

subtitles.original: ここは未来の島へ
subtitles.english: This is toward the future island

subtitles.original: Thank you Egghead! Bye-bye! See later!
subtitles.english: Thank you Egghead! Bye-bye! See later!

subtitles.original: [Dancing Reed]
subtitles.english: [Song: Dancing Reed]

subtitles.original: All right! Whoo!
subtitles.english: All right! Whoo!

subtitles.original: Everybody welcome to the stage, Sora-senpai!
subtitles.english: Everybody welcome to the stage, Sora-senpai!

subtitles.original: Happy birthday! Yes!
subtitles.english: Happy birthday! Yes!

subtitles.original: ドキドキ 演じたいけど
subtitles.english: I want to perform with a racing heart,

subtitles.original: 冗談なら笑えないよ
subtitles.english: but if it's a joke, I can't laugh.

subtitles.original: 渋滞 曖昧 どっち向くの？
subtitles.english: Congestion and ambiguity—which way do we face?

subtitles.original: 蜃気楼に手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: I reached out to a mirage.

subtitles.original: いつの世も 夢物語
subtitles.english: In any era, it's just a dream story;

subtitles.original: そんな光は 目隠しにして
subtitles.english: turn such light into a blindfold.

subtitles.original: 騒めく 鼓動 招き入れないで
subtitles.english: Don't invite the buzzing heartbeat in;

subtitles.original: 幻じゃ嫌だよ 私を奪って
subtitles.english: I don't want it to be an illusion. Take me away.

subtitles.original: 魅惑のダンシング
subtitles.english: Enchanting dancing,

subtitles.original: 止まない色気 収まらない熱
subtitles.english: unstoppable charm, uncontainable heat.

subtitles.original: 君の情緒は 私の信頼の証拠
subtitles.english: Your emotions are proof of my trust.

subtitles.original: 書き換えちゃうかも 責任重大ね
subtitles.english: I might rewrite them; a heavy responsibility.

subtitles.original: 一切合切 デンス・デンス・デンス・ウィア・ダンシング
subtitles.english: Everything, dance dance dance, we are dancing.

subtitles.original: 宙になって 此処身を任せて ゼログラビティ
subtitles.english: Become the air, leave yourself here—zero gravity.

subtitles.original: ヤ・バ・バ・バ デンス・デンス・デンス・ジャスト・ア・デンス
subtitles.english: Ya-ba-ba-ba, dance dance dance, just a dance,

subtitles.original: ジャスト・ア・デンス 声は闇に熱を灯すの
subtitles.english: just a dance. Voices light up heat in the dark.

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても離れないで
subtitles.english: Don't leave me, even if I wake up.

subtitles.original: メイビー ニーディー 正気じゃないのよ
subtitles.english: Maybe needy, I'm not in my right mind;

subtitles.original: 体温が忘れられない
subtitles.english: I can't forget your body heat.

subtitles.original: だぁれ かぁれ そんなんじゃないから
subtitles.english: Who or whom—it's not like that,

subtitles.original: 独り占めして ユーフォリア
subtitles.english: so keep it all to yourself—Euphoria.

subtitles.original: 禁止命令 上書きして
subtitles.english: Overwrite the prohibition order.

subtitles.original: 迷宮の世には 流せない
subtitles.english: In this labyrinth world, things can't flow.

subtitles.original: 寂幕 毒と偽りだって
subtitles.english: Even if it's loneliness, poison, or lies,

subtitles.original: 隠し切れない ゾーニング
subtitles.english: zoning can't be hidden away.

subtitles.original: 私に構って 狂い出す クレイジー・クレイジー・ラブ
subtitles.english: Pay attention to me, going mad—crazy crazy love.

subtitles.original: 魔天楼から 連れ去らって
subtitles.english: Take me away from the skyscraper.

subtitles.original: 君の表情は 私の心酔の証
subtitles.english: Your expression is proof of my intoxication.

subtitles.original: 塗り替えちゃいなよ 責任重大ね
subtitles.english: Go ahead and repaint it; a heavy responsibility.

subtitles.original: 過ぎ去ったネオン残像 シューティングスター
subtitles.english: The neon afterimage that passed by—shooting star.

subtitles.original: グライダー みたいに 漂えば
subtitles.english: If I drift along like a glider,

subtitles.original: 虚妄も何処もなかった
subtitles.english: there was no falsehood or anywhere else.

subtitles.original: 指先で待った 君を探している
subtitles.english: Waiting at my fingertips, I'm looking for you.

subtitles.original: その声を聞かせて
subtitles.english: Let me hear that voice.
